title: Global Leaders Meet for Climate Summit in Paris
summary: Representatives from over 150 nations have gathered to discuss aggressive carbon reduction targets.
content:
In an unprecedented gathering, world leaders have convened in Paris to negotiate stricter environmental policies. The summit aims to finalize agreements that will mandate a 50% reduction in global carbon emissions by 2035.

Discussions are heavily focused on providing financial aid to developing nations to help them transition to green energy.

Global reactions are pouring in as the situation develops. Industry experts predict widespread long-term ramifications.

Stay tuned to WorldGlobal for continuous, highly detailed updates on this developing story.
author: Ros Atkins
